# Copilot Instructions for Simple HTML Website

This is a simple HTML website project with a clean structure including header, navigation, main content sections, and footer.

## Project Overview
- **Type:** Simple HTML Website
- **Structure:** Single-page website with semantic HTML
- **Styling:** Inline CSS for simplicity
- **Features:** Responsive meta tags, navigation, multiple sections

## How to Use
1. Open `index.html` in any web browser
2. Customize the content, colors, and sections as needed
3. Add additional CSS or JavaScript as required

## Project Files
- `index.html` - Main website file with HTML structure and CSS styling
- `README.md` - Project documentation
- `.github/copilot-instructions.md` - This file

## Customization Tips
- Update the `<title>` tag for browser tab title
- Modify the `<h1>` in the header
- Add more navigation links in the `<nav>` section
- Update section content in the `<main>` element
- Customize colors in the `<style>` section
- Add footer links or additional information

## Next Steps
- Expand with separate CSS file
- Add JavaScript for interactivity
- Include more sections as needed
- Deploy to web hosting
